name: std-step-flow-cards-deck
description: Full-page card deck step flow — each step is rendered as one large centered card occupying the viewport with the step icon, title, and description prominent; progress-dots at the bottom indicate position in the sequence; primary advance + back controls flank the dots. Same StepFlowReview trait, same state machine, same emits/listens as std-step-flow — only the bodyContent tree differs. Suited for mobile-flavored onboarding, marketing-campaign creation flows, and any single-focus sequential UX.

schema.name: std-step-flow-cards-deck
schema.description: Full-page card deck step flow — each step is rendered as one large centered card occupying the viewport with the step icon, title, and description prominent; progress-dots at the bottom indicate position in the sequence; primary advance + back controls flank the dots. Same StepFlowReview trait, same state machine, same emits/listens as std-step-flow — only the bodyContent tree differs. Suited for mobile-flavored onboarding, marketing-campaign creation flows, and any single-focus sequential UX.

emits.description: Signals progression to the next step in the sequence.
Indicates a request to navigate to the previous step.
Indicates the user or system rejected the current step.
Signals a request to elevate the process to a higher authority.
Initiates a reset of the current workflow process.
Signals that the step items have been successfully loaded.
Indicates failure to load step configuration items.
emits.synonyms: load error, failed fetch, data problem

events.name: Step items loaded
events.description: Signals that the step items have been successfully loaded.

events.name: Step items load failed
events.description: Indicates failure to load step configuration items.
events.synonyms: load error, failed fetch, data problem

events.name: Step items saved
events.description: Data for the current step has been successfully saved.

events.name: Step items save failed
events.description: Indicates a failure to save step item data.
events.synonyms: save error, data failed, persistence error

events.name: Advance
events.description: Signals progression to the next step in the sequence.

events.name: Back
events.description: Indicates a request to navigate to the previous step.

events.name: Reject
events.description: Indicates the user or system rejected the current step.

events.name: Escalate
events.description: Signals a request to elevate the process to a higher authority.

events.name: Restart
events.description: Initiates a reset of the current workflow process.

children.content: This item has been escalated for further review.

bodyContent.label: Body content tree
bodyContent.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered while the step chain is active (loading-success, running, BACK). Default is the canonical wizard-progress + step-card + action-row tree. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (horizontal stepper, sidebar progress, card carousel, etc.) to deliver entirely different step UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

title.label: Flow title
title.description: Heading shown above the step progress bar

steps.label: Steps
steps.description: Ordered decision steps with label, icon, and optional role gates

cardLook.label: Card look
cardLook.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for cards rendered by this atom.
